internal.category_desc: These are fundamental building block components used internally across various other components. They are not intended for direct use in application code, but understanding them helps when contributing to or extending wimui.
internal.category_note: These components are internal implementation details. Prefer using the higher-level public components that encapsulate them.
internal.comp_base_list_role: Standardizes layout and interaction states for list-like items used in Menus, Selectboxes, and TreeViews.
internal.comp_field_template_role: Standardizes label placement, mandatory marks, and error message display for all form-related components.
internal.comp_indicator_base_role: Standardizes visual styling and animation for status dots and badges.
internal.comp_input_base_role: Standardizes the visual container, icon slots (Prefix/Suffix), and clear button behavior for text-based inputs.
internal.comp_overlay_base_role: Standardizes portal-based rendering, backdrop, and focus management for Dialogs, Drawers, and BottomSheets.
internal.comp_status_content_role: Standardizes layout for results and empty states, including icon, title, and description.
internal.field_template_features_error_desc: Integrated display of `FieldError` when an error message is provided.
internal.field_template_features_layout_desc: Support for vertical (default) and horizontal layouts.
internal.input_base_features_clear_desc: Automatic clear icon display when `allowClear` and `hasValue` are true.
internal.input_base_features_width_desc: Flexible width control (XS to XL or custom values).
internal.overlay_base_features_portals_desc: Ensures the component is rendered outside the main DOM tree to avoid z-index issues.
internal.overlay_base_features_backdrop_desc: Manages the darkened background (Overlay) and its click-to-close behavior.
internal.overlay_base_features_focus_desc: Integrated with `FocusTrap` to prevent focus from escaping the modal.
internal.overlay_base_features_perf_desc: Uses `will-change: transform` for high-frequency animations to ensure 60fps, offloading to the GPU.
internal.philosophy_desc: Guidelines for internal design consistency and encapsulation that should be followed when extending wimui or adding new components.

guide.internal_desc: Overview of the internal building-block components that underpin wimui's public API. Understanding these helps you contribute to or extend the library consistently.

principle.dom_desc: Keep the rendered DOM as flat as possible. Avoid unnecessary wrapper elements that add depth without semantic value.
principle.animation_desc: Use the Transition component for enter/exit animations. Do not implement custom CSS keyframes without consulting the design system team.
principle.transition_desc: All transitions must respect the user's reduced-motion preference via the `prefers-reduced-motion` media query.
